description: Zameen Jade - There is No Place like HomeThe jewel in the crown of the Sukh Chayn Gardens Society in Lahore, Zameen Jade acts as the beacon of light at the entrance of the community. Encapsulating and engaging, the monumental scale of the project offers 415 apartments that are truly unique in ethos, context and design. Modern elements are blended in perfect harmony with elegance and artistry as the project balances a functional, affordable and safe environment with ingeniously crafted spaces and facilities. Homage to its precious namesake, Zameen Jade is a masterpiece that is truly unmatched. Mostly known for its green varieties, Jade is a gemstone thats rooted in various cultures and comes with an extensive historical background.
